items.title: "Sun and Surf Furniture Trades" with HOST_Sprite & HOST_Maleficent begins in just 30 minutes! (10:00 AM EST) Please note that Pixels are not accepted for this trade. #MyVMK #VMK #Disney #Nostalgia
"Happy Birthday America!" with HOST_JudyHopps begins in just 30 minutes! (8:00 PM EST). Come along and see some of the ways we love to honor America's 250th! #MyVMK #VMK #Disney #Nostalgia

Happy Birthday, Canada! Today we celebrate Canada, its rich history, diverse cultures, and the people who call it home. Log in today and receive a "Canada Day - 2026" pin! Additional pins are available in the Emporium for 1 credit each through Friday, July 3 at 11:59 PM EST.
